hero.desc1: A trust-led organisation dedicated to excellence and sustainable, consistent long-term growth across diversified global businesses.
hero.desc2: We operate across multiple industries, building strategic partnerships and exploring new opportunities to create long-term value.
hero.desc3: Our focus is on innovation, global expansion, and responsible business development.

about.title: A versatile group, headquartered in Muscat, working across four continents.
about.lead: Yanabiya Gulf International Business & Trade delivers internet services, software solutions, IT consulting, trade and business automation across the Gulf, Asia, Europe and North America.
about.mission: To deliver top-class internet services and optimal software solutions at reasonable prices, complemented by consulting and business process outsourcing — built on three pillars: People, Process, and Clients.
about.vision: To become a leading global performer in providing quality web and software development solutions, leveraging professional talent from agency, corporate, and private sectors to help clients accelerate growth.

businesses.title: Six divisions powering enterprises and trade across continents.
businesses.sub: From enterprise software to international trade — built end-to-end.

solutions.title: Engineered to solve real business problems.
solutions.sub: A modern technology stack delivered by experienced engineers — from custom software to cloud, security and analytics.

partnerships.title: Powered by the world's leading technology providers.
partnerships.sub: We partner with global technology leaders to deliver enterprise-grade solutions across cloud, software, hardware and security.

global.title: Operating across four countries with nine entities.
global.sub: Our Yanabiya Group company currently operates in four countries, and we plan to gradually expand by entering more markets in the future. In each country, we are continuously upgrading and expanding our business categories day by day.

csr.title: Giving back to the communities we serve.
csr.sub: Yanabiya Group is committed to structured charitable donations and welfare programmes — focused on transparency and lasting impact.

welfare.d: Humanitarian aid programmes across the regions we operate in.

education.d: Scholarships and skill-development initiatives for under-served communities.

health.d: Supporting clinics, mobile camps, and emergency relief.

empower.d: Vocational training and small-business support to enable livelihoods.

network.title: Trusted Network
network.sub: Connecting Opportunities Worldwide to Build Strong, Scalable Global Businesses.

leadership.title: Guided by experience. Driven by integrity.
leadership.sub: Our leadership combines decades of enterprise expertise with deep regional knowledge across the Gulf, South Asia, the UK and the USA.
leadership.chairmanMsg: Yanabiya Group represents the Stamp of Quality & Professionalism. Our success comes from upholding core values rather than taking shortcuts. We deliver what we promise and place customer satisfaction above all — supported by a dedicated after-sales division ensuring service excellence.
leadership.viceChairmanMsg: Our website introduces our vision, mission, infrastructure, expertise, and future plans. We invite prospective clients and partners to explore our divisions and connect with us.

strategy.title: Where strategy meets execution.
strategy.sub: Our innovation roadmap is built on four pillars that align technology, talent and process with measurable client outcomes.

digital.d: Helping enterprises modernise legacy systems and adopt cloud-first architectures.

talent.d: Cultivating multidisciplinary teams across four countries.

process.d: Balancing speed, quality and cost in every engagement.

customer.d: Solutions designed around client problems, not generic templates.

insights.title: Thinking from the Yanabiya team.
insights.sub: Articles, case studies and thought leadership covering digital transformation, trade, security and cloud adoption.

careers.title: Build your career with a global group.
careers.sub: Join a team that values craftsmanship, ownership, and continuous learning.
careers.sendCv: Send your CV and a short note about what you'd like to work on.

contact.title: Let's start the conversation.
contact.sub: Reach our headquarters in Muscat or any of our offices across the UK, Bangladesh and the USA.
contact.name: Full name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.message: Tell us about your project or enquiry…
contact.thanks: Thanks — your message has been received.
